item.title: Free books? Oh yay! Free books!
item.description: https://gutenberg.org has over 70k free titles. No registration or apps necessary. You can even highlight text. I think first on my list is Gullivers Travels Man of La Mancha And Hitchhiker's guide to the galaxy. (Edit, well check elibrary) I'll bring my towel. What should I read next? Thanks to those with additional book sources in the comments: https://standardebooks.org https://librivox.org https://archive.org Local library for ebooks online Thank you @stimpackaddict13 " Librarian here! Check if your local library subscribes to Libby by Overdrive and/or Hoopla. They are digital lending services that have ebooks and eaudiobooks you can check out. You can connect your Libby to your Kindle so you can read your checked out books on it if you want to :)" Edit-trending: Please tell us your favorite books and what makes them great! FP edit: More sources suggested, ty! - https://annas-archive.org/ - https://www.freetechbooks.com/ - https://freebooksifter.com/ - https://www.pulpmags.org/ - https://openlibrary.org/ http://Librivox.org http://gutenberg.net.au/ (Australia) https://www.globalgreyebooks.com https://www.fadedpage.com https://freeditorial.com https://www.planetebook.com https://onlinebooks.library.upenn.edu Libby app with eReader I woke up to good things and accolades! Happy reading, everyone. Ty for sharing options. I'll keep checking back to make updates ❤️

item.title: Ballet dancer drawing by me using a ballpen
item.description: Hi guys, Iam a 19 year old ballpen artist I drew this drawing in 2023 Iam now selling this drawing to anyone who'd like to have this in their room Please let me know if you're interested or share to anyone you think would like this Or if you'd like a quick sketch for you or your loved ones drawn by me using blue ballpen send me your pic and I'll draw a 60min quick sketch for everyone who tips me (minimum 5$)
item.dc:creator: smx111arts

item.title: The support of the Imgur community really means a lot to me!
item.description: I have been writing, recording, and releasing new songs with this project for 3 years now. I have posted on Imgur many times, because I enjoy sharing with people. There is nothing special about me. Nothing all that interesting. I am not a Māori tribesman playing folk speed metal on a traditional nose flute, or an 11 year old kid that can play guitar better than Jimi Hendrix could, or anything cool like that. I'm just a dude that hangs out in his basement in his off time and enjoys writing and recording music, and that's okay. I share it here on Imgur, and the community has been awesome, and supportive, and I truly appreciate that so much. It is nice to have an outlet for my creativity, and the support means a lot to me. It's easy to feel lost in the world in life, and it helps to feel special sometimes. So, as I do often on this site, here is the latest song, my 72nd release: https://youtu.be/bX5jZf22ScM?si=9-lVxz0eDAYfn_tz
item.dc:creator: FromTheBeyond

item.title: Just shut up.
item.description: Sorry, don’t know the original source for this video. Anyway, Ive been spending more time on LinkedIn lately as I’m looking to change jobs. My feed is filled with so many ads, people pretending to have the answer to a successful career, and an insane amount of connection requests hounding me with products and “industry solutions.” I just want to look for a job. Anyone have better job listing sites they can recommend?
item.dc:creator: SoHellaCool

item.title: I painted something
item.description: I drew and painted this school I like in Oslo, Norway. Made it with watercolors fountain pen and fineliners. First I did two paintings, one of the skies and one of the building and ground. And I stitched it together i photoshop afterwards. I also edited colors (and moved the hot air balloon a bit) in psd. Hope you guys like it. Have a lovely weekend! www.instagram.com/vannfarger
item.dc:creator: PaintMags

item.title: Dump #227 - SDCC Edition
item.description:
1 Hey, y’all! I’m exhibiting this weekend at San Diego Comic Con! Artist Alley FF-02. If you’re around feel free to say hello.
2 Thanks so much to my fellow shitposters, without whom life would be even harder than it already is.
3
4 Me acting surprised when I already know the gossip.
5 Maybe. But I swear that water was CRISP.
6
7
8
9
10
11
12 I don’t know who made this but it is VERY niche and I love it.
13 Dayris! So cute!
14 *MaSkInG*
15 Not all parents are bad. Most are doing their best at the time. Still, there’s plenty of trauma that can happen.
16 Lil bebe
17 Y’all it is so hot this weekend in San Diego! I’m sweating like whoa.
18
19
20
21
22 Self-love is important!
23 “It’s not cinnamon-flavored is it?”
24 Lovely hand study. I do not have sauce.
25
26
27
28 The Mirage has closed! Big news in Vegas (where I live)
29 I am so pale and so sun sensitive.
30 Tell meeeeee.
31
32
33 Mood
34
35 MOOD
36
37 Unsure of artist, but so cute!
38
39
40
41 Yep! If you ordered it or got it at the thrift store, you may wanna consider tossing it.
42
43
44 Queen.
45 Look, none of us are happy, okay?
46
47 Unf!
48 Actually, yeah.
49 It’s a bit of a mess over here.
50 Thanks for scrolling! If you’d like to see some of the art I’m selling at SDCC, feel free to check out https://www.instagram.com/p/C91adoERk81/?igsh=MWZibjk0N2pnamw3aA==

item.dc:creator: Faira

item.title: The one man at my job club told a story and it and him were
item.description: The weekly Job Club I go to is run by a city and state hospital to help people with disabilities find careers. Well, the one gentleman seemed perfectly fine as this was the first club he had been to. So, we were all sharing stories of our struggles of trying to find a job in the current job market. Well, the new guy starts to tell a story about how he had to quit his job because of bullying. I have been bullied in the workplace, so my heart went out to him. Hang on! Suddenly, his story switched gears into sheer lunacy I have only heard on 4chan or by crackpots. He continued by saying that he was working at a state polling location and his coworkers were furries. Yes! You read that, right furries! At this point, I thought that I heard him wrong. Nevertheless, I did hear him right as he repeated that the coworkers were furries. Additionally, they would come to work dressed in their fursuits. Also, the gentleman went on to say that the one furry threatened to cut off his fingers if he didn't start showing up to work in a fursuit. He continued saying they threw pencils and screw drivers at him on the job all while in their fursuits. He ended the story by saying that he told HR and that they did nothing about it. Henceforth, he quit. Now, I have been working with this organization for a few years now, off and on. For that reason, I have worked and spoken with people of all abilities. Nonetheless, I have never experienced someone tell a story like this as if it were a fact. I'm really concerned about this man if he will just tell a story so nonsensical that he himself believes to be true. I don't know what compelled him to tell the group this story.
item.dc:creator: zeacorzeppelin10
